item.name: Heavenskey
item.description:
Due to being highly poisonous, it is believed to send those who eat of its flesh to the heavens. Compared to the seven hells, this may prove a more desirable destination.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Often avoided due to its potent poisonous properties, this fish is considered a rare delicacy for the man with nothing to lose. There is no questioning that one will die after even a mouthful. However, rumor has it that the heavenskey, as its name suggests, may save wayward souls intended for any one of the seven hells.
